description: Creates a plane in 3D space from two spanning (direction) vectors and a point on the plane.
utility: Create a plane from two spanning vectors and a point

arguments.name: v1
arguments.description: First spanning vector in the plane

arguments.name: v2
arguments.description: Second spanning vector in the plane (must not be parallel to v1)

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: A point that lies on the plane

alternates.description: Plane from two vector3d variables and a point3d variable

examples.scenario: Plane spanned by two vectors through a point
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = point3d(G, 1, 0, 0)
u = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 0)
v = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 1)
pl = spanplane3d(G, u, v, A)
